title: Thai-Style Canadian Duck Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired dish featuring Canadian duck in a creamy tagine sauce.
instructions: 1. Season the duck breast with salt and pepper.
2. Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Sear the duck breast until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
4. Transfer the duck to a plate and set aside.
5. Reduce the heat to medium and add the onion to the skillet.
6. Sauté the onion until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
7. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
8. Stir in the red curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
9. Pour in the fish sauce, brown sugar, and tagine sauce.
10. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes or until thickened.
11. Return the duck to the skillet and simmer for 2-3 minutes or until cooked through.
12. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with lime wedges.
